title: Difference between Status column and Label column
excerpt: I’m wondering what the differences between the Status column and the Label column.

posts.author: nstephenson (Nate Stephenson)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m wondering what the differences between the Status column and the Label column.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @nstephenson - the short answer, nothing. Monday was just trying to split into two types to make it clear you can use Status columns to track anything, not just statuses. The Priority column is also just a status column with predefined labels.

Mark
